purpose: Catalog of all 15 built-in agent role profiles in {tracker_root}/_commands/profiles/. Documents engineering profiles (architect, devops, qa, security, technical-writer), business strategy (founder, product, pricing), data analytics (analyst), marketing/sales (marketing, copywriter, sales, growth), and customer/operations (customer-success, legal). Each profile includes role description, key priorities, output style, and when-to-use guidance, plus a profile-by-use-case comparison table and combination patterns.
gotchas: Profiles are task-scoped -- they apply only to current task
When combined with !p/!p_track, profile content is included in EVERY worker prompt
Profile invocation syntax: !{profile_name} can be standalone or combined with commands
patterns: Persona-based behavioral preset layered on top of core agent instructions
Each profile has Role / Priorities / Constraints / Output Style / Success Criteria sections
Common output structure templates (e.g., security review with Scope/Threat Model/Findings)
conventions: Profile names match file names (.md), invoked with !{profile}
Tone and format guidance specific to each role
Always includes 'When to Use' section for disambiguation
